title: Steam is being Threatened by the Modern Audience now
description:
Valve(Steam) has upset the modern audience, as they are offended at Steam data being publicly available to gamers - the modern audience even threatening to create petitions demanding that Valve stop allowing gamers to see the aforementioned data. Much of their anger seemingly spurred on by recent Marathon Bungie discourse.
